info.title: Starvis API
info.description: Star Citizen Ships, Components, Items & Commodities API — Extracted from P4K game data and RSI Ship Matrix.

tags.name: Components
tags.description: Ship component database (weapons, shields, drives, etc.)

tags.name: Items
tags.description: FPS items (weapons, armor, clothing, gadgets, consumables)

tags.name: Mining
tags.description: Mining elements, rock compositions and solver

tags.name: Trade
tags.description: Commodity prices, trade routes and locations

tags.name: Calculators
tags.description: FPS damage and mining yield calculators

parameters.name: manufacturer
parameters.description: Filter by manufacturer code (e.g. AEGS, RSI)

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: Filter by role (Light Fighter, Medium Freight, etc.)

get.description: Returns distinct roles, careers, statuses and vehicle categories

get.summary: Get ship by UUID or class_name

get.description: Returns recursive port tree with resolved components (turret→gimbal→weapon, etc.)

get.summary: Get available paints for a ship
Get aggregated stats for a ship
get.description: Aggregated weapon DPS, shield HP, power draw, cooling, etc.
Returns all hardpoint/port info for a ship (type, size, equipped component)
Returns ships with the same role/career, sorted by similarity
Returns side-by-side numeric comparison with deltas and percentages

404.description: One or both ships not found

get.description: Returns all ships sharing the same chassis (e.g. Hornet F7C, F7C-M, F7C-R, F7C-S share chassis_id). Each variant differs mainly in loadout.

200.description: Variant list (full ship data, excluding current ship)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: WeaponGun, Shield, QuantumDrive, PowerPlant, Cooler, Gimbal, Turret, MissileRack, MiningArm, SalvageHead, TractorBeam, etc.

get.description: Returns all component types with count per type
Returns distinct types, sub_types, sizes, grades

get.summary: Get component by UUID or class_name
Get ships using a component by default

get.description: FPS weapons, armor, clothing, attachments, gadgets, consumables

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: FPS_Weapon, Armor_Torso, Armor_Arms, Clothing, Gadget, Consumable, etc.

parameters.name: sub_type
parameters.description: Assault_Rifle, Pistol, Shotgun, SMG, Sniper, etc.

get.description: Returns all item types with count per type
Returns distinct types, sub_types, manufacturers

get.summary: Get item by UUID or class_name

get.description: Tradeable goods: metals, gases, food, drugs, minerals, scrap, etc.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Metal, Gas, Food, Drug, Mineral, Scrap, etc.

get.description: Returns all commodity types with count per type

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by paint or ship name

get.summary: Get all RSI Ship Matrix entries
Get Ship Matrix entry by ID or name

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Ship Matrix ID (numeric) or ship name

post.summary: Calculate loadout stats with optional component swaps

get.summary: Unified search across ships, components and items

parameters.name: entity_type
parameters.description: Filter by entity type (ship, component, item, etc.)

parameters.name: change_type
parameters.description: Filter by change type (added, modified, removed)

get.description: Returns aggregated counts by entity_type and change_type
Returns counts of ships, components, items, commodities, manufacturers, etc.

200.description: Latest extraction metadata (game version, date, counts)
OK — database connected, game data status

get.description: Returns 200 if the service is alive (for Docker/Kubernetes probes)
Returns 200 if database and Redis are connected, 503 otherwise
Returns Prometheus-formatted metrics (request counts, durations, etc.)
Returns Redis cache hit/miss stats and connection status
Returns ships sorted by a numeric stat (speed, cargo, mass, etc.), excluding variants

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Filter by vehicle category (ship, ground, gravlev)

get.description: Search components filtered by type, size range and keyword

get.summary: Get buy locations for an item

get.description: Ranks rocks by probability for a given mineral or composition

400.description: Provide either element or composition param

200.description: Commodity price list with location data

get.description: Returns the most profitable buy/sell routes sorted by profit per SCU

parameters.name: system
parameters.description: Filter both endpoints by star system

get.description: Returns distinct locations that have commodity price data

post.description: Triggers a full sync from RSI Ship Matrix source

get.description: Returns Ship Matrix and Game Data internal statistics
Returns the game data extraction journal
Returns prices for a commodity across all locations
Returns all commodity prices at a given shop
Returns all distinct star systems with trade data
Returns all crafting categories with recipe counts
Returns all distinct crafting station types
Returns crafting recipes with optional filters
Returns a single crafting recipe with ingredients
Returns all mining laser heads and gadgets with their stats
Returns all distinct mission factions
Returns all distinct star systems with missions

post.description: Simulates FPS weapon damage with fire mode, hitbox, armor class and other modifiers
Simulates mining yield for a rock composition with optional laser and gadgets
